data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'License status and renewal/upgrade cues', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this requirement is met. While there are multiple successful prior steps indicating customer interactions and bookings, there is no explicit evidence showing how license status and renewal cues are presented to the user. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but it lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation.
gaps: No evidence of how license status and renewal/upgrade cues are presented to the user.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
